ShortDescription.SourceString:
<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">Everyone's favorite triangular bot is here to upgrade your spirits.</>
Snag the Robo-Kevin Pack featuring:
ShortDescription.LocalizedString:
<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">Everyone's favorite triangular bot is here to upgrade your spirits.</>
Snag the Robo-Kevin Pack featuring:

DisclaimerText.SourceString: V-Bucks are an in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite Battle Royale, Creative, and Save the World modes. In Battle Royale and Creative you can purchase new customization items like New Outfits, Gliders, Pickaxes, Emotes, and Wraps! In Save the World, you can purchase X-Ray Llamas that contain weapon and trap schematics, plus new Heroes, and more!
DisclaimerText.LocalizedString: V-Bucks are an in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite Battle Royale, Creative, and Save the World modes. In Battle Royale and Creative you can purchase new customization items like New Outfits, Gliders, Pickaxes, Emotes, and Wraps! In Save the World, you can purchase X-Ray Llamas that contain weapon and trap schematics, plus new Heroes, and more!

Name.SourceString: <text color="CA92FFFF">Robo-Kevin</> <text color="FFFFFFFF">Challenges.</> <text color="FFFFFFFF">Earn up to 1,000 V-Bucks and 1,000 X-Ray Tickets by completing </> <text color="CA92FFFF">Save the World </>  <text color="FFFFFFFF">daily quests.</> Rewards distributed after having completed the "Homebase Stormshield Defense 1" mission in <text color="CA92FFFF">"Save the World" </>Campaign.
